description: Small benchmark for evaluating multi-document evidence chains.

cases.question: Why is the parent company connected to the final product launch?
cases.answer: Aurora is connected to the final launch because Aurora acquired Borealis Labs, and Borealis Labs built the Helios navigation stack used in the launch vehicle.

documents.title: Acquisition Announcement
documents.text: Aurora acquired Borealis Labs in 2024 to strengthen autonomy and navigation research.

documents.title: Product Launch Brief
documents.text: Borealis Labs developed the Helios navigation stack that was integrated into the Aster launch vehicle.

documents.title: Investor Commentary
documents.text: Several aerospace firms discussed hiring plans and market demand without mentioning Helios.

reasoning_hops.claim: Borealis Labs developed the Helios navigation stack used in the launch vehicle.

cases.conclusion_claim: Aurora is connected to the launch because it owns Borealis Labs, which built the Helios navigation stack used in the vehicle.

cases.question: Why does the answer overstate the relationship between the organization and the vaccine program?
cases.answer: Northstar Health directly ran the vaccine program because it funded Meridian Research, which designed the Aurora vaccine trials.

documents.title: Foundation Grant Notice
documents.text: Northstar Health funded Meridian Research for respiratory analytics and lab infrastructure.

documents.title: Trial Operations Update
documents.text: Aurora vaccine trials were designed by Meridian Clinical Systems, an unrelated organization.

documents.title: Public Health Background
documents.text: Regional clinics expanded flu outreach and hired temporary staff.

reasoning_hops.claim: Meridian Research designed the Aurora vaccine trials.

cases.conclusion_claim: Northstar Health directly ran the Aurora vaccine program through Meridian Research.
